_note: Non-secret, account-scoped config for the example scripts. Copy to personio.config.json (gitignored) and fill in your account's values, then pass it with --config ./personio.config.json. Every value also falls back to a PERSONIO_* env var. Attendance and absences come from DIFFERENT Custom Reports, so their ids are separate (attendanceReportId / absenceReportId); set only the ones you use — omit an id to make that record type fall back to the granular v2 API. These and costCenters are DEFAULTS; --attendance-report-id / --absence-report-id / --cost-centers override per run. Credentials do NOT go here — they stay in .env.
